title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF TUBANG, CAMANGARAN AND SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAMBUJAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 590 / 55 OG No. 36, 7624 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2467, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF TUBANG, CAMANGARAN AND SAN ISIDRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAMBUJAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and Hotcse of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following, barrios are hereby created in the Municipality of Pambujan, Province of Samar:

Barrio Tubang, consisting of the sitios of Irinlum and Bajuaticlum;

Barrio Camangaran, consisting of the sitios of Geyaot, Balud and Colawinang; and

Barrio San Isidro, consisting of the sitios of Anislagan, Nabaye, Guenalomsan and Gebonawan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
